gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 requested that direct-record fallback docs mention --release-engine-actions-json alongside --release-engine-probe-json; both READMEs and the governance guard were patched, then GPT-5.5 re-reviewed and approved with no findings.
scope: README benchmark-plan documentation, legacy migration README benchmark-plan documentation, and project-governance README regression tests.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_project_governance.py::test_readme_benchmark_plan_examples_include_release_actions_sidecars tests/test_benchmark_plan.py::test_main_can_include_planned_engine_probes_and_release_evidence_validation -q; poetry run pytest tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_benchmark_plan.py -q; python -m compileall -q src/document_kv_cache src/restaurant_kv_serving; git diff --check; poetry run pytest -q
what_changed: Updated the root and legacy benchmark-plan README examples to include engine-probe action sidecar outputs for both vLLM and SGLang, documented that planned release probes require those action outputs, and clarified that existing probe records must be paired with existing connector-action records.
why: Release evidence now requires connector-action sidecars alongside native engine probe JSONs; the public benchmark-plan recipe should generate release-ready commands instead of guiding users into missing action artifacts.
